docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY CEIRANTE, ALYSE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHES, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JAN-14-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHES, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CEIRANTE, ALYSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHES, MICHAEL $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,250.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHES, MICHAEL
